mapper.select: SELECT id, diary_id, user_id, created_at FROM diary_favorites WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT f.diary_id AS id, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN '日记已失效' ELSE d.title END AS title, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE d.summary END AS summary, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE d.cover_url END AS cover_url, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE d.view_count END AS view_count, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN 0 ELSE d.like_count END AS like_count, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN 0 ELSE d.favorite_count END AS favorite_count, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN 0 ELSE d.comment_count END AS comment_count, 0 AS liked, 1 AS favorited, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE d.published_at END AS published_at, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS invalid, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.id END AS author_id, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.nickname END AS author_nickname, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status != 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS author_avatar_url FROM diary_favorites f LEFT JOIN travel_diaries d ON f.diary_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC
